overview: This four-color Pioneer deck utilizes Scapeshift to rapidly accelerate land count, enabling early access to high-cost threats. By combining land search and untap effects from Lumra and Formidable Speaker, it generates massive mana advantages to overwhelm opponents before they can stabilize.
win_conditions: Casting large creatures or spells early via Scapeshift acceleration
Triggering landfall or enter-the-battlefield effects repeatedly
Generating overwhelming card and mana advantage through land untap engines

keep_criteria: Hands with Scapeshift and multiple lands
Hands containing Formidable Speaker or Lumra with early land drops
Hands with at least three mana sources and a ramp spell
mulligan_criteria: Hands lacking Scapeshift or land acceleration
Hands with four or more lands but no combo enablers
Hands missing early mana sources to cast Formidable Speaker

early_game: Play lands and cast Lumra to search for basics and establish board presence
Prioritize drawing into Scapeshift while maintaining land count
Avoid overcommitting to non-land cards unless necessary
mid_game: Activate Formidable Speaker to untap extra lands each upkeep
Cast Scapeshift to exile hand cards and flood the battlefield with lands
Begin deploying large threats or combo pieces enabled by the mana surge
late_game: Maintain landfall triggers and continuous mana generation
Use excess mana to cast game-ending spells or stabilize against opponent's threats
Cycle through hand to keep Scapeshift viable if needed

key_cards.name: Scapeshift
key_cards.notes: Cast when you have multiple lands and non-land cards in hand to exile them and put equal or greater number of lands from your graveyard onto the battlefield, enabling early access to high-cost spells.

key_cards.name: Lumra, Bellow of the Woods
key_cards.notes: Play on turn one or two to search for a basic land and put it onto the battlefield tapped, ensuring consistent mana base development while providing a body.

key_cards.name: Formidable Speaker
key_cards.notes: Untaps an additional land during each upkeep, creating exponential mana growth when combined with Scapeshift land floods to cast large threats early.

sequencing_tips: Always ensure you have enough lands in hand to pay for Scapeshift before exiling them
Prioritize untapping lands with Formidable Speaker before casting Scapeshift to maximize land count
Hold back at least one land in hand to pay for Scapeshift's mana cost
Sequence land drops to maintain a steady curve before triggering the combo

matchups.advice: Prioritize early land drops and use Lumra to stabilize quickly, then accelerate past their curve with Scapeshift.
Play around counterspells by holding back key cards, and use Formidable Speaker to generate enough mana to cast threats on curve despite disruption.
Race them by flooding lands early and deploying large threats before they can establish value engines.

common_threats: Hand disruption and card draw engines

overview_evidence.evidence_span: Scapeshift, Lumra, Bellow of the Woods, Formidable Speaker

win_conditions_evidence.evidence_span: Scapeshift, Lumra, Bellow of the Woods, Formidable Speaker

sequencing_tips_evidence.evidence_span: Scapeshift, Lumra, Bellow of the Woods, Formidable Speaker

common_threats_evidence.evidence_span: Scapeshift, Lumra, Bellow of the Woods, Formidable Speaker
